message: 🆘 URGENT: My best friend met with a severe train accident today morning. Admitted in AIIMS trauma centre. Need 4 units O NEGATIVE blood IMMEDIATELY. He is in ICU losing blood fast. Anyone O- plz contact 9876543210. Please share in all groups 🙏🙏
